subcodes.first_line: The long letter of that daughter of the Kingdom was perused and given great attention... Whenever any soul explains any matter, he must have authority from the verses of God, and the words of the Supreme
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه مفصل آن بنت ملکوت ملاحظه گردید و بدقت تمام مطالعه شد
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @importance of authoritative interpretation, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
